items.claim: Kai Kamaka is technically sound but lacks finishing danger.
items.quote: Kai Kamaka very technically sound, but not dangerous, you know?

items.claim: Luke Riley possesses significant power in his strikes.
items.quote: Luke Riley's got pop on his shots.

items.claim: Luke Riley is capable of out-striking Kai Kamaka even if Kamaka defends takedowns.
items.quote: Luke Riley's just going to strike with them anyway.

items.claim: Kai Kamaka lacks the wrestling pedigree required to take down Luke Riley.
items.quote: You're going to need an actual wrestler to take this kid down.

items.claim: Kai Kamaka has a durable chin.
items.quote: Kai Kamaka's got a good chin though.

items.claim: Adrian Yanez is faster than Cody Garbrandt.
items.quote: I think Adrian Yanez is faster than I'm giving

items.claim: Cody Garbrandt has a tendency to skirt the fence during fights.
Gable Steveson has limited experience, having only been fighting for eight months.
Alisha Ellison has a significant experience advantage with four years of fighting.
items.quote: Alisha Ellison at least has been fighting for 4 years.

items.claim: Nikita Krylov has a history of chin issues, having been finished by Dominick Reyes and Bogdan Guskov.
items.quote: Nikita Krylov was having chin issues. He got chinned by Dominick Reyes, chinned by Bogdan Guskov.

items.claim: Robert Whittaker possesses superior footwork and technique compared to Nikita Krylov.
items.quote: his footwork is so much better, guys.

items.claim: Nikita Krylov's striking technique is sloppy.
items.quote: Nikita Krylov looking a little sloppy even in the last one
